issues.description: Difference badges drop below WCAG AA contrast when margins fall sharply.
issues.userImpact: Low-vision users may miss large negative margin changes during active trading sessions.

issues.description: Date and instrument filters do not keep a consistent focus order after refresh.
issues.userImpact: Keyboard-only users can lose context while trying to compare previous and current totals.

issues.description: Expiry spread rows are rendered without accessible names for assistive technology.
issues.userImpact: Screen-reader users cannot identify which contract spread they are reviewing.

issues.description: Virtualized spread rows skip focus after data refresh.
issues.userImpact: Keyboard users can jump past live spread updates and lose track of the selected instrument.

issues.description: The prioritized alert banner contains a stale ARIA attribute after rerender.
issues.userImpact: Assistive technologies may announce the banner inconsistently after correlation refreshes.
